title: boechera perennans subsp. texana
intro: Boechera perennans subsp. texana, also known as Texas rockcress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Boechera perennans subsp. texana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Boechera perennans subsp. texana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
